paragraphs: While you slept, the Wan 2.1 pipeline ran in quiet rhythm. 27 clips finished generation, each ~47 minutes of RTX 3060 Ti compute. 11 scored HERO (⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐) and 14 scored GREAT.
The best clip of the night is **vigolas** at **97.7/100** (HERO). Filename: `vigolas_W21_000_00_530767.webp`. Stage it first.

Everything is staged, scored, and waiting. Open the morning index, click through the top 5 in the reviewer, mark your favorites with `approved.flag`, then run `upload_ready_launcher.py --write-bat` to generate the batch upload script. Nothing has been uploaded — that's always your call.
9 achievements unlocked so far. Every new clip might unlock another. 25+ background services are alive. ComfyUI is patient. Mingus watches over the queue.
HADOM Quoka. Yet we are part of something.
